name: Courtney Giauque
focus: Research operations • Strategic planning • Financial management
bio: Courtney Giauque serves as Assistant Director in Radiant where she supports Center objectives through operational excellence. Throughout her experience in private business and university settings, she has built a reputation for advancing strategic goals through effectively coordinating resources, optimizing processes, managing finances soundly, fostering collaborative dynamics, and building authentic relationships. With two baccalaureate degrees from NAU and a Master of Business Administration from ASU and the Thunderbird School of Global Management, Courtney understands first-hand the transformative power of higher education in Arizona.
